description: Testimony about the receipt of a shipment belonging to a person who had died, Qayrawan, 978. Avraham b. Kabīr asks for approval about a shipment of indigo to Qayrawan for the person who previously had the indigo in Fustat, Qimoy b. al-Ḥasan. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #106) VMR
description_he: עדות על קבלת משלוח לאדם שנפטר, קיירואן, 978, על משלוח אינדיגו לקיירואן
